interaction_phrase: merging the strengths of the IQM Crystal and IQM Star processor topologies
occurrence_sentence: Our development roadmap focuses on seamlessly merging the strengths of the IQM Crystal and IQM Star processor topologies to achieve hardware-efficient quantum error correction.

interaction_phrase: the unique strengths of the Crystal and Star chip topologies
occurrence_sentence: By leveraging the unique strengths of the Crystal and Star chip topologies, QLDPC codes enable a two- to tenfold efficiency improvement over traditional surface codes.

interaction_phrase: combining IQM Crystal and IQM Star into
occurrence_sentence: Then, by combining IQM Crystal and IQM Star into [IQM Constellation](https://iqm.tech/blog/iqm-constellation-a-new-quantum-processor-architecture-for-scalable-error-correction/), our new QPU architecture for scalable error correction, we advance rapidly from NISQ-era applications to fault-tolerant quantum systems with stringent error rates.

interaction_phrase: combining IQM Crystal and IQM Star into [IQM Constellation]
occurrence_sentence: Then, by combining IQM Crystal and IQM Star into [IQM Constellation](https://iqm.tech/blog/iqm-constellation-a-new-quantum-processor-architecture-for-scalable-error-correction/), our new QPU architecture for scalable error correction, we advance rapidly from NISQ-era applications to fault-tolerant quantum systems with stringent error rates.
